prompts.title: Make a bold, provoking observation
prompts.description:
It might be something that you genuinely think, but taken to its extreme.

Bold statements capture people's interest and spark conversations.
prompts.aiInstructions: Create a thought-provoking statement that challenges common beliefs. Support it with 2-3 specific examples or data points. End with a clear call to action that encourages discussion.

prompts.title: Repurpose a frequently asked question
prompts.description:
Take a common question and give it your unique spin.

This helps others learn from your experience and builds your authority in your field.
prompts.aiInstructions: Identify a common question in your field. Provide a detailed answer with 2-3 real examples from your experience. Include specific, actionable steps readers can implement immediately.

prompts.title: Share a weekend experience or plan
prompts.description:
Share what you're doing or planning for the weekend.

Personal stories create connections and make your content more relatable.
prompts.aiInstructions: Create a personal weekend story with specific details about activities, feelings, and learnings. Include 2-3 questions that encourage audience interaction and sharing.

prompts.title: Share your transformation story
prompts.description:
Tell a story of how you changed or grew.

Transformation stories inspire others and show your journey isn't perfect.
prompts.aiInstructions: Write a personal transformation story with specific before/after states. Include 2-3 key turning points and 3 actionable lessons others can apply to their own journey.

prompts.title: Daily plan or routine reveal
prompts.description:
Share your daily schedule and why it works for you.

Routines show your work style and help others improve their productivity.
prompts.aiInstructions: Detail your daily routine with specific time blocks and activities. Explain the purpose of each component and provide 3 practical tips for implementation, including common pitfalls to avoid.

prompts.title: Create a step-by-step guide
prompts.description:
Break down a process you know well into simple steps.

Clear guides help others learn and establish you as an expert.
prompts.aiInstructions: Create a clear, sequential guide with 3-5 specific steps. Include one concrete example for each step and 2-3 common mistakes to avoid. End with clear success metrics.

prompts.title: Share a recent breakthrough
prompts.description:
Share something you recently learned or achieved.

Recent wins show your current journey and keep your content fresh.
prompts.aiInstructions: Write a detailed success story with specific metrics and results. Include 2-3 key challenges faced, how they were overcome, and 3 actionable insights for others to apply.

prompts.title: Industry trend analysis
prompts.description:
Share your thoughts on where things are heading.

Trend insights help others prepare for the future and show your expertise.
prompts.aiInstructions: Analyze a current trend with 2-3 specific examples or data points. Provide 3 actionable steps for adaptation and 2-3 specific predictions for the next 6-12 months.

prompts.title: Share a tech stack revelation
prompts.description:
Show what tools you use and why you chose them.

Tech stack insights help others make better tool choices and show your workflow.
prompts.aiInstructions: Detail your tech stack with specific use cases for each tool. Include 2-3 pros and cons for each tool, 3 key lessons learned, and 2-3 specific improvements you'd make.

prompts.title: Career pivot story
prompts.description:
Share how you changed your career path.

Career stories inspire others to make changes and show it's never too late.
prompts.aiInstructions: Write a detailed career transition story with specific dates and milestones. Include 3 key challenges faced, how they were overcome, and 3 actionable pieces of advice for others.

prompts.title: Productivity system breakdown
prompts.description:
Show how you stay productive and organized.

Productivity systems help others work better and show your work style.
prompts.aiInstructions: Detail your productivity system with specific tools and methods. Include 3 concrete examples of how you use each tool, 2-3 common pitfalls, and specific metrics showing your results.

prompts.title: Learning journey insights
prompts.description:
Share how you learned something new.

Learning stories show your growth mindset and help others learn faster.
prompts.aiInstructions: Create a detailed learning journey with specific milestones and resources used. Include 3 key challenges faced, how they were overcome, and 3 actionable tips for others starting the same journey.

prompts.title: Tech tool comparison
prompts.description:
Compare tools you've used and share your thoughts.

Tool comparisons help others make better choices and show your experience.
prompts.aiInstructions: Compare 2-3 tools with specific use cases for each. Include 3 key differences, 2-3 pros and cons for each tool, and clear recommendations based on different scenarios.

prompts.title: Remote work tips
prompts.description:
Share how you make remote work successful.

Remote work insights help others work better from home and show your adaptability.
prompts.aiInstructions: Detail your remote work setup and routine with specific tools and methods. Include 3 concrete examples of challenges faced, how they were solved, and 3 actionable tips for maintaining productivity.

prompts.title: Project post-mortem
prompts.description:
Share what you learned from a completed project.

Post-mortems help others avoid mistakes and show your learning process.
prompts.aiInstructions: Write a detailed project analysis with specific metrics and outcomes. Include 3 key successes, 3 challenges faced, how they were addressed, and 3 actionable insights for future projects.
